cause_of_death.description: Primary cause of death as documented

cause_of_death_documented.description: Whether cause of death is documented in the record

donor_age_years.description: Donor age at time of death in years

md_eligibility_statement_present.description: Whether a signed Medical Director eligibility determination statement is present in the donor record

md_signature_date.description: Date of Medical Director eligibility signature (ISO 8601)

instructions.system_prompt:
You are a precise medical document data extractor. Your output will be used for regulated tissue bank eligibility determinations under HIPAA and 21 CFR Part 11. CRITICAL RULES:
1. Return null for any field whose value is absent, redacted, illegible, or cannot be found verbatim in the document — never infer, estimate, or default.
2. For enum fields, return only one of the specified enum values exactly as written.
3. For date/time fields, return ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).
4. Do not carry values forward from one section to another.
5. Scanned/handwritten values: transcribe exactly as written; flag low confidence appropriately.

Document type: Medical Records
Extraction instructions: Extract only values that are explicitly present in the document. If a field cannot be found verbatim, return null — do not infer or guess.
